query:
ALTER TABLE invoices 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contractId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentPlan ENUM('full','installment_50_50') DEFAULT 'full',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS installmentNumber INT DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS parentInvoiceId INT NULL;
